name: Baelish (sellsword)
sentence: The great-grandfather of Petyr Baelish was a Braavosi sellsword who came to the Vale of Arryn in service to House Corbray.

name: Balerion
sentence: One of five dragons brought by Aenar Targaryen when he fled Valyria, Balerion was the last dragon to witness the Freehold in its prime and was later claimed by Aegon the Conqueror.

name: Balerion (cat)
sentence: An old black tomcat with a torn ear, believed to be the kitten once owned by Princess Rhaenys Targaryen.

name: Barth (brewer)
sentence: The brewer at Winterfell, whose wife took Theon Greyjoy's virginity.

name: Benjen Stark (Bitter)
sentence: A King in the North of House Stark who is buried in the crypts beneath Winterfell.

name: Benjen Stark (Sweet)
sentence: A King in the North of House Stark who is buried in the crypts beneath Winterfell.

name: Bessa (Hag's Mire)
sentence: A girl from Hag's Mire who was murdered by Chett after rejecting and mocking him.

name: Bessa (Winterfell)
sentence: A tavern wench who works at the Smoking Log in the winter town outside Winterfell.

name: Blood (horse)
sentence: A red stallion with a temper to match his master's, owned by Ramsay Bolton.

name: Boy (thrall)
sentence: A young thrall and oarsman in the Iron Fleet who has been rowing for less than a year and is roughly twenty years old.

name: Brandon Stark (Bad)
sentence: Brandon the Bad was a King in the North of House Stark who is buried in the crypts beneath Winterfell.

name: Brandon Stark (Breaker)
sentence: A King of Winter who formed an alliance with Joramun to end the thirteen-year rule of the Night's King at the Wall.

name: Brandon Stark (Shipwright)
sentence: A King in the North known for his love of the sea who attempted to sail across the Sunset Sea thousands of years before Aegon's Conquest and was never seen again.
